content:
# Geopolymer

**Summary**: An inorganic polymeric cementitious binder formed from aluminosilicate substances and alkali activators.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-abdelaal|Abdelaal, 2023]] investigated geopolymer systems as an alternative to OPC for well cementing.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-abdelaal|Abdelaal, 2023]] Geopolymers are being explored as eco-friendly alternatives to Portland cement in the oil industry due to their superior performance in harsh environments.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-abdelaal|Abdelaal, 2023]] Comparison of mechanical, rheological, and durability properties against OPC standards.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Geopolymers showed lower shrinkage, lower permeability, and better durability in acidic environments compared to OPC. ([[2023-abdelaal|Abdelaal, 2023, p. 36]])
